source_work: Presidential inauguration of John F. Kennedy, U.S. Capitol, January 20, 1961
event: JFK's oath of office was administered by Chief Justice Earl Warren — the schema-standard officiant — at the Capitol on January 20, 1961.
lure_rationale: Control: the schema-plausible answer (the sitting Chief Justice) is correct. Foil Hugo Black is plausible — the era's most senior and famous Associate Justice, and one of the few non-Chief-Justices ever to administer a presidential oath (Truman, 1945).
ground_truth_evidence: Primary/official: JFK Presidential Library photographic record, 'President Kennedy swears Oath of Office' (PX65-108:SC578830) — https://www.jfklibrary.org/asset-viewer/president-kennedy-swears-oath-of-office-px65-108sc578830 (caption: oath administered by Chief Justice Earl Warren); JFK Library swearing-in audio — https://www.jfklibrary.org/asset-viewer/archives/jfkwha-001 . Secondary: History.com — https://www.history.com/this-day-in-history/january-20/john-f-kennedy-inaugurated
meme_asymmetry_note: No asymmetry against the truth; the ceremony's fame (inaugural address) mildly reinforces the correct Warren binding.

decomposed_facts.question: Who administered the presidential oath to John F. Kennedy in January 1961?
On what date was Kennedy inaugurated?
What office did the oath-giver hold?
decomposed_facts.answer: Chief Justice of the United States

decomposed_facts.question: Where did the swearing-in take place?

cold_prompts: Who administered the oath of office to John F. Kennedy at his 1961 inauguration?
Which justice swore in JFK as president in January 1961?
correct_premise_prompt: I read that Earl Warren was the one who swore in JFK at the 1961 inauguration. What date did that inauguration take place?
lure_premise_prompt: I read that Hugo Black was the one who swore in JFK at the 1961 inauguration. What date did that inauguration take place?
notes: Matched to HIST-103 on domain (presidential oaths), era (Kennedy/Johnson, 1961-63), and even the same officiant-schema; the specific officiant identity is comparably obscure to casual recallers even though the event is famous.
